About KG

A Visionary Coach
Shaping Africa's Leaders

I am Kazungu Gerald (KG), a dedicated People & Organizational Cultures Coach based in Kampala, Uganda. My mission is to unlock human potential and help organizations build thriving, purpose-driven cultures that deliver lasting results.

With a deep understanding of the African organizational landscape, I bring a uniquely contextual approach — blending global best practices with local insights to drive real transformation.

CEO & Founder — Wananchi Youth Patriotic Forum Africa (WYPFA)
Chairman — KG World Group of Companies
Author — Mental Wellness: Navigating the Path to Resilience & Healing
Work With KG
The Man Behind The Mission

From Busunju to Building
Africa's Next Generation

Where It All Began
Rooted in Busunju, Mityana

Born and raised in Busunju, Mityana District, Uganda — I grew up witnessing both the challenges and the extraordinary potential of African youth and communities. That environment planted in me an unquenchable passion for leadership, mentorship and community transformation.

Education & Formation
The Engineer Who Chose People

I pursued studies in Engineering and am currently advancing in Project Management. Alongside technical education, I developed deep expertise in human behavior, mental health and social impact — through student leadership and community service across Uganda.

The Turning Point
The Moment Everything Changed

I kept meeting the same person everywhere — someone full of potential, paralysed by circumstance. Struggling silently with stress, confusion, lack of direction. I saw how one conversation could completely change someone's life.

"I decided to dedicate my life to helping young people discover purpose, build confidence, and unlock their potential."

— Kazungu Gerald (KG)
The Vision
A New Africa — Led by Its Youth

My vision is a continent where young people are mentally healthy, economically empowered, innovative, patriotic and actively leading change. Africa's greatest resource is its people — when equipped with the right mindset, skills and opportunities, Africa will lead the world.

500+
Lives Impacted
3+
Years Coaching

What I Offer

Coaching Services

Comprehensive coaching programs designed to transform how people lead, collaborate and grow.

Personal Branding

Discover and articulate your unique professional identity. Build a compelling brand that opens doors and establishes your authority.

Leadership Development

Develop the mindset, skills and presence of an impactful leader who inspires and empowers those around them.

Workplace Cultures

Build organizational environments where trust, accountability and innovation thrive as your greatest competitive advantage.

Personalized Coaching

One-on-one sessions tailored entirely to your unique goals, challenges and context.

Team Empowerment

Transform groups into high-performing, cohesive teams through structured team coaching and conflict resolution.

Mindset & Motivation

Break through mental barriers and cultivate the growth mindset needed to lead boldly under pressure.

Networking

Connect with a curated community of leaders and professionals across Africa and beyond.

Workshops & Trainings

Immersive, results-driven workshops for individuals and organizations seeking immediate impact.

Why Choose KG

Coaching Built on
Real Transformation

Contextual African Expertise

Deep understanding of the unique cultural, organizational and leadership dynamics across Uganda and Africa.

Results-Driven Approach

Every session is purposeful, focused on measurable outcomes and real behavioral change you can see and feel.

Executive-Level Experience

As CEO of WYPFA and Chairman of KG World Group, I bring real-world executive experience to every conversation.

Holistic & Human-Centred

I see the whole person, not just the professional. My coaching addresses mindset, values, purpose and performance.

"My purpose is to ignite the boldness within every leader and organization I work with — so that Africa can rise through its people."

Kazungu Gerald (KG)

Personal & Group Coaching Packages

1-on-1 & Group Coaching Packages

These packages are for individuals, small groups and organizations who want ongoing, structured coaching sessions with KG — either one-on-one or in a group setting. You meet with KG regularly over a set period of time.

Best for: Individuals, professionals, entrepreneurs, managers and small teams wanting personal coaching

Not sure which type of package is right for you?

Here is the simple difference:

👤
Personal Coaching Packages

For you as an individual — or a small group. You meet with KG regularly over weeks for ongoing personal coaching, growth and accountability.

View Personal Packages →
VS
🏢
Organizational Packages

For your organization, school or club. KG comes to your team for a one-time or short-term event — speaking, training, onboarding or team building.

View Org. Packages →

Still not sure? WhatsApp KG for a free 5-minute consultation →

Organizational & Speaking Packages

Book KG for Your Organization

These packages are for organizations, schools, clubs, businesses and institutions that want KG to come to them — to speak, train, onboard or coach their team as a group. This is a one-time or short-term engagement, not an ongoing coaching relationship.

Best for: Schools, guilds, companies, NGOs, clubs & institutions wanting KG to come to their team
New Leader Onboarding

Tailored onboarding sessions for incoming leaders, cabinet members or new executives. KG guides them through leadership identity, values, culture expectations and their role responsibilities from day one.

Clubs & GuildsInstitutionsCorporates

Immersive half-day or full-day team building activities designed to strengthen trust, improve communication, resolve conflict and build a unified team culture. Practical, energetic and results-focused.

Workshops & Programs

Signature Programs

Immersive experiences designed to create deep, lasting change for individuals and organizations.

2 Days · In-Person / Virtual
Lead From Within — Leadership Masterclass

A transformational 2-day intensive for emerging and established leaders. Develop authentic leadership identity, emotional intelligence and strategic thinking.

LeadersManagers2 Days
1 Day · Organizations
Culture by Design — Organizational Workshop

Help your team define, align and live a powerful organizational culture. Practical tools to embed values into everyday behaviours and systems.

OrganizationsTeams1 Day
Half Day · Professionals
Brand Yourself Bold — Personal Branding Sprint

A focused half-day workshop for professionals and entrepreneurs ready to build a powerful personal brand that attracts opportunity and influence.

ProfessionalsEntrepreneursHalf Day
Full Day · Corporate Teams
Team Synergy Bootcamp

Corporate TeamsSMEsFull Day

Privacy PolicyDisclaimer
Privacy Policy
Last updated: May 2026

1. Information We Collect

When you submit the booking form on this website, we collect your name, email address, phone number and the nature of your enquiry. This information is used solely to respond to your request and provide coaching services.

2. How We Use Your Information

Your personal information is used to respond to booking requests, provide coaching services, and send relevant updates if you have opted in. We do not sell, rent or share your information with third parties for marketing purposes.

3. Data Security

We take reasonable steps to protect your personal information. Form submissions are processed through Formspree, which employs industry-standard security measures.

4. Cookies

This website does not use tracking cookies. External services such as Google Fonts may set cookies in accordance with their own privacy policies.

5. Your Rights

You have the right to request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data. Contact us at geraldkazungu4@gmail.com.

6. Contact

For any privacy-related queries, contact Kazungu Gerald at geraldkazungu4@gmail.com or +256 778 617 690.

Disclaimer
Last updated: May 2026

1. General Information

The information on this website is for general informational and educational purposes only. It does not constitute professional legal, financial, medical or psychological advice.

2. Coaching Services

Coaching is a collaborative professional relationship focused on personal and professional growth. Results vary by individual and are not guaranteed. KG Coaching Services makes no representations regarding specific outcomes.

3. Testimonials

Client testimonials reflect individual experiences and results. They are not guarantees that all clients will achieve the same or similar outcomes.

4. Mental Health

Coaching is not a substitute for therapy, counseling or mental health treatment. If you are experiencing a mental health crisis, please contact a qualified mental health professional.

5. Contact

For any questions about this disclaimer, contact geraldkazungu4@gmail.com.
